subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Amr
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath created all beings through His command and brought forth the creation of all things in ways beyond reckoning, were ye to comprehend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی خلق الخلق بأمره و ابدع خلق کلشیء اقرب من ان یحصی ان انتم تعلمون
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
